name: Miglior Canned Cat Food - Lamb & Carrots Chunks, 405g
shortDescription: Montego BAGS O’ WAGS Beef Bars are deliciously chewy treats made with high-quality ingredients, perfect for adult dogs who deserve something extra special. Whether used as a daily reward, training treat, or a between-meal snack, these bars are sure to satisfy.
description: Montego BAGS O’ WAGS Beef Bars are deliciously chewy treats made with high-quality ingredients, perfect for adult dogs who deserve something extra special. Whether used as a daily reward, training treat, or a between-meal snack, these bars are sure to satisfy. Formulated for maximum taste and nutrition , Beef Bars help support your dog’s energy and vitality. Ideal for reinforcing good behaviour, boosting training sessions, or simply sharing a joyful moment. Key Benefits Highly palatable: Dogs love the rich beef aroma and chewy texture. Nutritious: Provides quality protein and energy for active pets. Training aid: Perfect for positive reinforcement and good behaviour. Daily snack: A tasty, wholesome treat without overfeeding. Ingredients Corn starch, chicken meal, water, glycerine, propylene glycol, sugars, chicken fat, wheat gluten, sodium phosphates, fish oil, carrageenan. ADDITIVES (/kg):  SENSORY: Palatability meat-based enhancers with beef aroma, red colourant; PRESERVATIVES:  Potassium sorbate.‎ Free from: artificial sugars, soy, eggs, dairy, and meat-based fillers. Nutritional Information Nutrient Amount Crude Protein 20% Total Fat 5% Crude Fibre 1% Moisture 18.5% Calcium 1.2% Phosphorus 0.8% Sugars 4% Metabolizable Energy 385 kcal/100 g These treats are intended as a snack and not a complete diet. Always provide fresh water.
